sources.hardware_engine_relevance: Pinned engine used for every local run.
sources.decision_impact: Upgraded production Fast to the same v0.25.1 digest already used by Heavy.

sources.hardware_engine_relevance: Adds VLLM_WSL2_ENABLE_PIN_MEMORY and WSL2 pinned-memory support.
sources.decision_impact: Enabled the opt-in on lab and production Gemma services.

sources.hardware_engine_relevance: Reports Gemma NVFP4 versus BF16 on one B200 at concurrency 128 and describes dynamic NVFP4 layer formats.
sources.decision_impact: Triggered the matched concurrency-128 local retest and corrected the earlier c1-only interpretation.

sources.hardware_engine_relevance: Shows B12x gains grow with concurrency but are smaller than the full Unsloth headline.
sources.decision_impact: Treated B12x as one possible component rather than the whole explanation.

sources.hardware_engine_relevance: Fixes dense flashinfer_b12x linear-backend selection after v0.25.1.
sources.decision_impact: Did not attribute stable v0.25.1 CUTLASS measurements to B12x.
